title: CENTER FOR MEDICALLY FRAGILE CHILDREN - 211info
text: PROVIDENCE CHILD CENTER CENTER FOR MEDICALLY FRAGILE CHILDREN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides 24-hour nursing care for children, including short-term stays, medical evaluation and treatment, recovery after surgery or illness, and respite care. Also offers long-term care with team-based care planning and coordination. 830 NE 47th Avenue Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Age 21 and younger with complex medical needs requiring 24-hour skilled nursing care Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Phone: Monday-Friday 7am-5:30pm (503) 215-2837 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 215-2837 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to be prescreened FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Financial assistance program available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fee. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7am-5:30pm Services: Children's Out of Home Respite Care * Disabilities Issues Nursing Facilities * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SWINDELLS RESOURCE CENTER REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - PROVIDENCE CHILDREN'S DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PROVIDENCE CHILD CENTER
